en: Send a text to +14165550101 saying "I'm on my way.".
Please SMS +14165550102 with "Please call me when you're free.".
Send +14165550104 a message that says "I'm outside now.".
Can you send an SMS to +14165550105 saying "Can you send me the address?"?
Send a text to +14165550106 saying "Meeting moved to 3 PM.".
Please SMS +14165550107 with "Don't forget the documents.".
Send +14165550109 a message that says "I'll text you after the call.".
Can you send an SMS to +14165550110 saying "Thanks for the update!"?
